title: Claims About Political Control Networks
summary: Drop #4 focused on influence networks, media narratives, and alleged hidden control structures surrounding political elites.
raw_text:
Why is the National Guard important?
Why is the military the only way?
Why did the Founders specifically exclude political affiliation within the military?
Who controls the media?
Why is this relevant?
Why is the FBI leaking information?
Who controls the FBI?
Who controls the DOJ?
Who controls the MSM?
Q

lines.fact: Media ownership in the United States is concentrated among several large corporations, though no single entity controls all media.
lines.theory: Q followers interpreted this as evidence of coordinated propaganda and censorship efforts.
lines.context: Media distrust became a central component of the broader QAnon narrative ecosystem.
lines.questions: What evidence would demonstrate coordinated editorial control across separate media organizations?
lines.Deltas: 2020-2025: Ongoing debates over censorship, platform moderation, and media trust continued but did not verify a unified control structure.
